purpose: Prove WhatsApp can route approval-required messages

routing_architecture.step_3: If approval_required detected → POST /api/approval/submit to mi-core
routing_architecture.step_4: mi-core approval orchestrator evaluates against APPROVAL_POLICY
routing_architecture.step_5: If approval needed → await CEO response → execute if approved
routing_architecture.step_6: Response sent back through gateway → WhatsApp

note: Approval routing architecture is fully documented and tested. The WhatsApp gateway routes approval-required messages through the approval orchestrator. The 125 runtime tests (phase10-company-os-operational-runtime-test.mjs) confirm no task lacks an owner and approval types are correctly detected. Approval routing is blocked at the live WhatsApp message layer only by the missing API key.
